headline: Memory Prices Rose Again, but Micron Stock Is Slumping
summary: FEATURE   Micron Technology stock was falling early Wednesday amid a wider selloff in technology stocks. However, prices for its memory chips are only heading upward.  The shares were down 3.2% in premarket trading.
